_comment: Copy this file, fill it in, and pass it to /arena-install, /arena-create.

scene_assets.name: my_background
scene_assets._source_note: Use 'built-in' OR provide host_usd_path for custom assets. The container path is derived automatically from extra_mounts.

extra_mounts._comment: Add one entry per host directory that contains custom USD files.

task_description: Pick up the object and place it on the target.
success_condition: EEF within 5 cm of the object centre
